summary: Bathroom - High angle and close-up views of toilet area, wall paneling, flooring, and fixtures.

items.name: Walls - Tiled Section (Bath/Shower & Vanity Area)
items.description: White rectangular ceramic wall tiles with dark grey grout lines covering walls around bath and vanity unit up to soffit/coving line. Dark marble-effect cladding visible above mirror cabinet.
defects: Grout lines appear sound but may require inspection for discoloration in close-up.

items.name: Ceiling - Painted with LED Lighting
items.description: Painted white ceiling featuring recessed LED strip lighting along perimeter (above coving) and central downlights.

items.name: Flooring - Main Area & Wet Zone
items.description: Dark grey marble-effect large format ceramic tiles covering main floor area and extending into shower tray/wet zone.

items.name: Bath - White Roll-top Tub
items.description: White standard roll-top tub situated in tiled surround area with chrome mixer tap and overflow plate mounted on wall above rim.

items.name: Shower Screen & Rail System
items.description: Clear glass shower screen enclosure with chrome rail system holding hand-held shower head.

items.name: Vanity Unit - Floating White Cabinet
items.description: White painted floating vanity unit (MDF/Wood) with integrated white ceramic basin/sink top surface.

items.name: Basin Mixer Tap - Chrome
items.description: Chrome mixer tap mounted onto sink surface/wall interface (two circular chrome items visible).

items.name: Mirror Cabinet - Large Rectangular Unit
items.description: Large rectangular mirrored cupboard unit mounted above vanity featuring dark grey marble-effect cladding/frame around mirror panels and top section.

items.name: Toilet - White Back-to-Wall Pan
items.description: White ceramic back-to-wall style pan (cistern concealed in wall) with chrome seat cover/rail visible.

items.name: Heated Towel Rail - Chrome Multi-Bar Unit
items.description: Chrome finish multi-bar heated towel rail mounted vertically on left wall.

items.name: Wall Hooks - Brass/Bronze Coat Knobs
items.description: Two brass/bronze colored round coat hooks/knobs mounted at mid-level height (likely near entrance).

items.name: Floor Mat - Black and White Checkered Rectangular Rug
items.description: Black and white checkered rectangular floor mat placed centrally on tiles.

items.name: Bathroom Scale - Glass Digital Unit
items.description: Glass digital bathroom scale with metal buttons located near towel rail.

items.name: Architrave / Door Frame
items.description: White painted woodwork surrounding the bathroom entrance (P013).
defects: None observed in this view.

items.name: Wall (Exterior)
items.description: Cream emulsion painted wall visible outside the bathroom door in P013.
defects: None observed.

items.name: Flooring (Hallway Area)
items.description: Beige carpet or laminate flooring visible at the bottom left of P013, separated from bathroom tiles by a threshold strip.
defects: None observed in this limited view.

items.name: Door
items.description: White painted interior door with black handle and letterbox plate (P013).
defects: None observed.

items.name: Heated Towel Rail
items.description: Chrome heated towel rail mounted on the tiled wall (visible in P013).
defects: None observed.

items.name: Wall Tiling (Bathroom)
items.description: White rectangular ceramic tiles covering the bathroom walls visible in P015 and partially behind rail.
defects: None observed.

items.name: Bathtub Rim/Edge
items.description: White acrylic bathtub rim/side panel visible at the top of P014 and bottom right edge in P013.
defects: None observed on exposed edges.

items.name: Shower Screen / Glass Panel
items.description: Clear glass shower screen panel visible at the right edge of P013 and in close-up in P015.
defects: Glazing not clean - faint water marks/streaks present on lower section (P015).

items.name: Bath Mat
items.description: Black and white checkered plush bath mat placed in front of the tub (P014, P013 bottom right).
defects: None observed.

items.name: Weighing Scale
items.description: Digital weighing scale with grey/white casing sitting on floor tiles (left side of P014).
defects: None observed.

items.name: Wall Tiling
items.description: White gloss ceramic wall tiling covering the shower surround and bath area. Dark grey grout lines visible.

items.name: Shower Mixer Taps (Chrome)
items.description: Dual control chrome mixer taps mounted on tiled surround.
defects: Small chip low level to leading edge of left-hand chrome handle faceplate.

items.name: Shower Head & Hose System
items.description: Black finish shower head with flexible hose and rail system mounted on tiled wall.
defects: Light scale to plastic trim of hose connection area.

items.name: Shower Screen (Glass Panel)
items.description: Edge of glass shower screen visible to the left in P020.

items.name: Ceiling Vent/Fan Unit
items.description: White circular extractor fan/heater unit mounted on ceiling/soffit.

items.name: LED Strip Lighting
items.description: Integrated LED strip light running along the soffit edge above bath/shower area.

items.name: Bathtub (Rim/Edge)
items.description: White acrylic/fiberglass bathtub rim visible at bottom of P019 and P020.

items.name: Walls (Upper Section)
items.description: Dark grey/black marble-effect ceramic tiles covering the upper walls. Visible in P025, P026, P027.
defects: Glazing/tiles not clean: minor smudges and water marks visible on tile surface (P025), particularly near the top edge of frame.

items.name: Flooring / Wall Base (Lower Section)
items.description: Dark grey/black marble-effect ceramic tiles extending to floor level or skirting height, matching upper tiling.
defects: Glazing/tiles not clean: faint water marks and streaks visible on the lower tiled section (P027).

items.name: Vanity Unit (Wooden Paneling)
items.description: Light wood-grain effect laminate/wood paneling forming the vanity unit structure, including open shelving and internal LED strip lighting.
defects: Dust accumulation: slight dust visible on top edges of shelves (P026).

items.name: Washbasin Basin(s)
items.description: White ceramic rectangular basin unit integrated into the vanity plinth.
defects: Stains/shade marks: minor water marks and streaks visible at the base of the sink plinth edge (P025).

items.name: Mixer Tap(s)
items.description: Chrome finish mixer tap with lever handle and spout mounted on the sink plinth.
defects: Limescale: no visible limescale or tarnish on chrome surfaces (P025).

items.name: Socket Outlet
items.description: White double socket outlet mounted on the wooden paneling.
defects: Dust: slight dust accumulation in/outlet faceplate (P027).

items.name: Thermostat Unit
items.description: Digital thermostat/control unit with small LCD screen and buttons, white faceplate.
defects: Screen: display appears dark/off or showing minimal info; otherwise functional appearance (P027).

items.name: Vent Cover
items.description: Black circular air vent cover mounted on the lower tiled wall section.
defects: Dust: slight dust accumulation around edges of vent (P027).

items.name: Toilet Seat/Lid Cover
items.description: White plastic cover for toilet seat/cistern top, partially visible at bottom right of P027.
defects: Stains: minor water marks or smudges on surface (P027).

items.name: Walls (Tiling/Paneling)
items.description: White/grey finish covering walls to ceiling line throughout room visible in photos. Includes built-in wall niche area near waste bin location.
defects: Dust accumulation high level wall paneling near vent/light fixture (top right corner P032/P031 reflection).

items.name: Flooring (Tiles)
items.description: Dark grey marble-effect tiles with white veining throughout room visible in photos.
defects: Scuff marks low level adjacent to bath mat edge (left side P032).
Minor scuffs mid-level floor area near toilet base.

items.name: Toilet Pan and Seat
items.description: White ceramic pan with matching soft-close seat/lid (hinges visible). Cistern flush plate mounted in wall paneling to left of toilet.

items.name: Cistern Flush Plate
items.description: Chrome finish dual-flush mechanism with buttons and lever handle mounted in square frame on wall paneling.

items.name: Waste Bin
items.description: Stainless steel cylinder with pedal base located near wall niche recess to right of toilet.

items.name: Bath Mat
items.description: Black and white checkered pattern rug/mat placed on floor near bath edge (bottom left of photos).

items.name: Toilet Brush
items.description: Black handled brush located next to waste bin.

items.name: Ventilation Grille/Light Fixture
items.description: Circular vent/light fixture mounted high level on wall near ceiling line (top right corner P032/P031 reflection).
